nodes.label: Remove node with smallest f(n) from OPEN
For each successor, calculate g(n') and f(n')
Is successor in OPEN or CLOSED?

visuals.title: A* Search Algorithm Flowchart
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Informed Search and Heuristics</text>
  
  <!-- Start Node -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="80" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Start
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Goal Node -->
  <circle cx="340" cy="80" r="25" fill="#4CAF50" stroke="#2E7D32" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Goal
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Heuristic Estimate -->
  <text x="340" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    h(n) = 15
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Search Path -->
  <path d="M105,80 C150,40 200,40 250,80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Alternative Path -->
  <path d="M105,80 C150,120 270,120 315,80" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="4,4" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Heuristic Explanation -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="320" height="80" fill="#FFF" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Heuristic Function h(n)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Estimates cost from node n to goal
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Guides search toward promising paths
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Algorithms -->
  <rect x="50" y="250" width="150" height="60" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="125" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Greedy Best-First
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="125" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Uses h(n) only
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="220" y="250" width="150" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="295" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A* Search
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="295" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    f(n) = g(n) + h(n)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
